CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2014 Continued To Apr-30-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-27-2014 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. DALMAR ISMAIL, TEL. NO. (510) 893-1777 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. GAY YNN KIRN CONANT OF LOMBARDI, LOPER & CONANT, LLP, TEL. NO. (510) 433-2600 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff's complaint is barred as a matter of law because the lawsuit was not initiated before the expiration of the applicable statute of limitations. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/eg

DEFENDANTS JEFFREY FRITZ, JANE WONG, STEPHEN LAU, CARL TIANEN, THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA and KATHRYN MENTE's (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS KATIE MENTE) DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained, with twenty days leave to amend.
